summary.why: Beads sets core.hooksPath=.beads/hooks/ — timbers was hardcoding .git/hooks/ so hooks were installed where git never reads them
summary.how: GetHooksDir reads git config core.hooksPath, falls back to .git/hooks; GeneratePreCommitHook takes hooksDir param for dynamic chain backup path

notes: This is a band-aid. Both beads and timbers want to own the pre-commit hook, and core.hooksPath is winner-take-all. The real fix is for beads pre-commit to have a plugin/chain mechanism so timbers can register without owning the hook file. For now, timbers installs to wherever core.hooksPath points and --chain backs up whatever was there.
